title: geraniospermum hirsutum
intro: Geraniospermum hirsutum is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is commonly known as the "climbing menispermum" due to its climbing habit. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. Geraniospermum hirsutum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
